short-bio: I am a second year student at Burdur Mehmet Akif Ersoy University Computer Engineering department. I am particularly interested in software development, web design and programming, graphic design. I serve as a freelancer on related issues.
bio: I was born in Istanbul on November 8, 1999. After completing my primary education here, I started my high school life at Antalya Karatay Anatolian High School. I started web programming applications besides the lectures in the numerical department in which I was in high school. After high school, I qualified to enter the Burdur Mehmet Akif Ersoy University department. I studied preparation on foreign language. I am now a 2nd grade student. I am particularly interested in software development, web design and programming, graphic design. I serve as a freelancer on related issues.
testimonial-engindemirog: I can proudly say that Ahmet is a 'wanted' developer who can apply the techniques used in corporate projects and can handle any kind of project...
